description: Pain Engine backlog — structured idea store

items.name: Scheduler Health Dashboard Panel
items.description: Add a real-time health panel to scheduler-ui.html showing queue depth, failure rate, avg task duration, and overnight mode status.

items.name: VST Hero Section — Booking CTA + Destination Carousel
items.description: Build hero section with primary booking CTA button, destination image carousel, and trust signals. Gate-ready asset.

items.name: FHI Fraud Report Submission Form
items.description: Accessible multi-step fraud report form. Compliant, mobile-first, validates on submit. Required for FHI v1 launch.

items.name: Pre-Gate Audit UI Panel
items.description: Surface pre-gate audit results directly in scheduler-ui.html — verdict badge, flag list, dimension floor breaches.

items.name: VST Pricing Plans Page
items.description: White-label pricing page with 3-tier plan cards, comparison table, and Stripe-ready CTAs.

items.name: Experimental Dark Mode Theme
items.description: Prototype dark mode CSS variables for scheduler UI. Not production-ready.
